mapper.select:
SELECT c.content AS message, m.member_id AS sender_id, m.member_name AS sender_name, m.member_thumb AS sender_thumb, (select hex_code from color_tbl where color_id = m.current_color_id) as hex_code
FROM chat_message c INNER JOIN member_tbl m ON (c.member_id = m.member_id) WHERE chat_room_id = #{id} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC

SELECT p.chat_room_id AS room_id, r.name AS room_name, r.is_group_chat, r.my_name, r.other_name, r.market_no, r.my_id, r.other_id
FROM chat_participant p INNER JOIN chat_room r ON (p.chat_room_id = r.id)
WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId}
ORDER BY p.chat_room_id DESC

SELECT * FROM chat_room WHERE id IN (SELECT cp1.chat_room_id FROM chat_participant cp1 INNER JOIN chat_participant cp2 ON (cp1.chat_room_id = cp2.chat_room_id) WHERE cp1.member_id = #{memberId} AND cp2.member_id = #{otherMemberId} AND market_no = #{marketNo}) AND is_group_chat = 1
